title: Verify existing implementation of Breadcrumb component
description: The Breadcrumb component already exists at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.tsx with props: items: { label: string; href?: string }[]. The active item (last) renders as plain text with 'breadcrumb-active' class, others render as links. Includes a chevron separator icon. The test file at src/components/ui/breadcrumb.test.tsx has 8 tests covering rendering all items, links for non-active items, active item as plain text, single item, empty array, separators, aria-label, and items without href.
